note_zone_method: Static lookup by codepoint. Context-dependent for waw (U+0648) and ya (U+064A): short vowel on the letter (fatha/kasra/damma) → consonantal zone; sukoon or no harakat → madd → zone 1.
note_ta_marbuta: ة (U+0629) assigned zone 5 (tongue) — same anatomical locus as ت. Distributional comparison with ت and هـ is a finding, not an assumption.
note_ghunna: has_ghunna=True for ن (27,380) + م (27,071) + tanween-carrying letters (7,200). Zone 7 (خيشوم) encoded as secondary boolean, not a primary zone override.
next: M6: Geometric family assignment (10 families + dot configuration)
